rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no relation to Educ. Code §37.0812, which governs active shooter training for school district peace officers and school resource officers.
quote: A school district peace officer or school resource officer shall complete an active shooter response training program approved by the Texas Commission on Law Enforcement at least once in each four-year period.
_note: No overlap between proposed property tax change and school officer training statute.
